name: Mexi-Cali Layered Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted - mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mashed avocado, 2 tablespoons PACE Picante Sauce, lemon juice, and salt; mix well.
2. Stir in chopped tomato.
3. Spoon the mixture evenly onto the bottom of a shallow 1-quart clear glass bowl with straight sides preferred.
4. Top with sliced olives.
5. Cover and chill.
6. To serve, top the olives evenly with sour cream.
7. Spoon remaining PACE Picante Sauce over the sour cream.
8. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar or Monterey cheese.
9. Serve with tortilla chips or corn chips.
10. Makes about 3 1/2 cups dip.
